# Business — Generative Engine Optimization Map

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover premium apps for sale or list your software on AppMarket. Connect with serious buyers and sellers in our trusted marketplace for applications.

### How It Works
https://example.com/how-it-works
Learn how AppMarket streamlines buying and selling applications. From listing creation to final sale, our platform guides you through every step effortlessly.

### For Sellers
https://example.com/for-sellers
Showcase your app with pricing, domain details, and visuals to attract serious buyers. Start selling your software on AppMarket&#39;s trusted platform today.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Have questions about buying or selling apps? Our AppMarket team is ready to assist with listings, transactions, and platform guidance. Reach out now.

### Products
https://example.com/products
Our Products - AppMarket

### Product Detail
https://example.com/product/:slug
Product Details - AppMarket

### Category
https://example.com/category/:slug
Products - AppMarket
